title: Asyyyriak

'''Asyyyriaks''' were vicious arboreal creatures native to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. They spent most of their time high above the forest floor, using branches to travel among the trees.<ref name="UA" />

The brown-skinned body of an asyyyriak was covered entirely with long, brown and green hair, useful for camouflage among the stringy forest moss. Adult asyyyriaks averaged one to two meters in length.<ref name="UA" />

Asyyyriaks were great hunters, preying primarily upon avians and small arboreal animals. During the Kashyyyk's cold season, asyyyriaks hibernated; however, they stalked the forests during the warmer seasons, sometimes attacking vulnerable young Wookiees.<ref name="UA" />
